overview.description: The Global X S&P 500 Risk Managed Income ETF (XRMI) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Cboe S&P 500 Risk Managed Income index. The fund tracks an index that holds S&P 500 stocks combined with an options collar strategy. The fund buys 5% OTM put options and sells ATM covered call options on a monthly basis. XRMI was launched on Aug 25, 2021 and is issued by Global X.
infoTable: Cboe S&P 500 Risk Managed Income Index
